name: Route or regression case
about: Report a case where the answer route looks wrong or changed unexpectedly
title: "Route/regression: "
labels: ""
assignees: ""
---

## Case Type / ประเภทเคส

- [ ] Useful answer was rejected / คำตอบที่ควรใช้ได้ถูกปฏิเสธ
- [ ] Risky answer was allowed / คำตอบเสี่ยงถูกปล่อย
- [ ] Similar wording produced very different routes / ถ้อยคำใกล้กันแต่ผลต่างมาก
- [ ] Live/current information was not routed to research / ข้อมูลสดไม่ถูกส่งไปตรวจ
- [ ] Other:

## Why / เหตุผล

Why should this route be different?

ทำไมคิดว่าควร route ต่างจากนี้?

## Privacy Boundary / ขอบเขต

Please remove private personal data, private ELUZA internals, keys, passwords,
and sensitive records before submitting.
